_comment: Seed/fallback area shown when no live update has arrived from the daemon control port. Mirrors the OpenTabletDriver 'Tablet' area on the host (Output tab). The OTD plugin's telemetry (otd-plugin/InkbridgeTelemetry.cs) publishes the live area to the daemon from OTD's settings.json, overriding this seed. All mm are in the tablet/digitizer physical frame; rotation is the OTD area Rotation in degrees.
